steps.title: Identify what the passage focuses on
steps.content: The passage focuses exclusively on how jazz tap developed: its origins in African American communities, its connection to jazz music in the 1920s, and how it evolved alongside jazz through the 1930s-1940s.

steps.title: Match the focus to the purpose statement
steps.content: Choice B states the passage “discusses the development of a dance form.” This fits—the text traces jazz tap's origins through its evolution alongside jazz music. The other choices address topics absent from the passage: why audiences prefer music (A), how to play instruments (C), or individual dancer fame (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
